name: Cheese Custard Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cottage cheese through a sieve.
2. Add sugar, flour, egg yolks, milk, and vanilla extract to the cottage cheese. Mix well.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff.
4. Gently fold the egg whites into the mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a crust and bake for 3/4 hours in a medium oven (350 degrees).
